Container.Name: Routarr
Container.Overview: Automatic Plex/Jellyfin to Tunarr routing. Define rules by genre, label, or library and Routarr drops matched content into the right Tunarr channel whenever something new lands on your server. Supports Plex, Jellyfin, or both simultaneously.
Container.Requires: A running Tunarr instance and at least one of Plex or Jellyfin.

Config.Name: WebUI Port
Config.Description: Port for the Routarr web interface.

Config.Name: Appdata
Config.Description: Persistent storage for the Routarr database.

Config.Name: Tunarr URL
Config.Description: URL of your Tunarr instance. e.g. http://192.168.1.10:8000

Config.Name: Plex URL
Config.Description: URL of your Plex server. e.g. http://192.168.1.10:32400. Leave blank if using Jellyfin only.

Config.Name: Plex Token
Config.Description: Your Plex authentication token. Leave blank if using Jellyfin only.

Config.Name: Jellyfin URL
Config.Description: URL of your Jellyfin server. e.g. http://192.168.1.10:8096. Leave blank if using Plex only.

Config.Name: Jellyfin API Key
Config.Description: Your Jellyfin API key. Leave blank if using Plex only.

Config.Name: Plex Source ID
Config.Description: Tunarr source ID for Plex. Auto-detected if left blank.
